zh.Brabourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭肯特布拉布恩
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Scott I於1370年出生在英國肯特布拉布恩時，他的父親William John Scott15歲，母親Matilda de Cumbe25歲。他於大約1385年與Matilda de la Cumbe在英國英格蘭肯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1447年在他的家鄉享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Scott I于1370年出生在英国肯特布拉布恩时，他的父亲William John Scott15岁，母亲Matilda de Cumbe25岁。他于大约1385年与Matilda de la Cumbe在英国英格兰肯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1447年在他的家乡享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Scott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (Down): habitational and ethnic name from Middle English Scot ‘man from Scotland’. There is no evidence that the surname denoted either of the earlier senses of Scot as ‘(Gaelic-speaking) Irishman’ or ‘man from Alba’, the Gaelic-speaking region of Scotland north of the river Forth. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English and Scottish: from the rare Middle English personal name Scot (Old English Scott, possibly also Old Norse Skotr), only certainly attested in northern England.

variants.name: Scutt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Pierre.
English: nickname for a short person, from Middle English scut(e) ‘short’, or else for a swift runner, from Middle English scut ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Scott I was born in 1370, in Brabourne, Kent, England, his father, William John Scott, was 15 and his mother, Matilda de Cumbe, was 25. He married Matilda de la Cumbe about 1385, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1447, in his hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Scott I est né en 1370, à Brabourne, Kent, Angleterre, son père, William John Scott, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Cumbe, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Matilda de la Cumbe environ 1385, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1447, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

Er hat um 1385 in Kent, England, United Kingdom Matilda de la Cumbe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1447 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Matilda de la Cumbe circa 1385, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1447, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Scott Iが1370年にイギリスケントブラボウルンで生まれた時，父William John Scottは15歳，母Matilda de Cumbeは25歳であった。約1385年にイギリスイギリスケントでMatilda de la Cumbeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1447年に故郷で77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Scott I(이)가 1370년 영국 켄트 브라보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William John Scott(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda de Cumbe(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 Matilda de la Cumbe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1447년 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Matilda de la Cumbe aproximadamente 1385, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1447, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Scott I родился в 1370 г. в местности брабурн, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени William John Scott было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Cumbe, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda de la Cumbe около 1385 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1447 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.
